product.title: Cedar Hollow Natural Deodorant
product.description: Small-batch deodorant made in Florida for people who read ingredient labels. Our aluminum-free formula uses arrowroot and magnesium hydroxide to keep you fresh through a Tampa summer, with no baking soda to irritate sensitive skin. Every stick is a one-time purchase, no subscription required, and we never auto-enroll you in anything. Glides on clear, no white marks on dark shirts. If cedar isn't your thing, the Unscented version has zero added fragrance.
